title: BIM Coordinator [Mechanical / Construction]
description:
Company Overview

Kingfisher HR Solutions Group founded in 2003, is a global one-stop HR solutions provider. Our services include executive search, talent search, RPO, EOR, career learning, education, and overseas HR solutions. We operate across Asia Pacific and Europe, with offices in Kuala Lumpur, Singapore, Brunei, Mumbai, Tokyo, Amsterdam, Hong Kong, Taiwan, China, and more. We support industries such as industrial & manufacturing, healthcare, tech, retail, financial services, and corporate functions. With a talent pool of 5 million and over 600 clients, we bring 20 years of experience in delivering strategic HR solutions.

Job Summary

Design and draft detailed MEP layouts and coordinated drawings for construction projects, resolving interdisciplinary clashes and supporting project teams through planning and site coordination activities.

Responsibilities

  • Design and draft MEP layouts, sections, plant rooms, and space plans to meet project specifications
  • Create detailed, coordinated drawings and proactively resolve clashes between disciplines to ensure seamless integration
  • Produce accurate shop drawings and as-built drawings using Revit software to support construction and documentation needs
  • Extract and interpret relevant information from architectural, structural, and other technical drawings to inform MEP designs
  • Collaborate with project managers and engineers by assisting in coordination, planning, and conducting site visits and meetings as required

Required competencies and certifications

  • Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (minimum)
  • Minimum 2 years of experience working in an M&E subcontractor environment

Other Information

  • Monday to Friday, 8.30am – 5.15pm
  • East
  • UP $4,500 Basic + Variable Bonus + Allowances

For interested applicants, please click “QUICK APPLY”.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified.

By submitting your personal data and/or resume, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us collecting, using, retaining, and disclosing your personal information to prospective employers for their consideration.

KINGFISHER RECRUITMENT (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

EA Reg No: R23116361 | EA Lic No: 17C8713
